rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Clear title heading. No amounts present. Structural label introducing the section.

rows.description: 1788 Novr. Mr. William Seiriett's Plate Money
rows.notes: Clear handwriting. Date, name, and description legible. Amounts perfectly aligned with column boundaries: 10|0|0. All values within valid range.

rows.description: Mr. Bawden's Do.
rows.notes: Clear text. 'Do.' = ditto/same as previous (Plate Money). Amount 10|0|0 clearly aligned with column boundaries.

rows.description: oft the Revd. Mr. Cale St. K.D. oft Bonfaction
rows.notes: Amount 110|0|0 is clear and well-aligned. Description text is somewhat compressed and handwriting is variable in quality, but all key words are readable. 110 pounds is unusually large but within plausible range for clergy collections.

rows.description: Summen't due at Midspr. Cov. from the Parrott
rows.notes: Amounts 61|5|2½ are clearly aligned. Shillings 5 and pence 2 are well within valid ranges. Fraction symbol after pence appears to be 'ob' (half-penny), interpreted as 0.5. Minor ink variation on the '6' in pounds but reading is certain.

rows.description: of Mr. Oersley Esq. Mrs. East fold. Ketcham
rows.notes: Amount 175|0|0 is clearly aligned and legible. Description text has some abbreviated/compressed handwriting but is readable. All currency values within valid range. High confidence on numerics.

rows.description: Jno. Geo. King & Mrs. Ben Cogging's Attorney
rows.notes: Amount 20|0|0 is clear and well-aligned. Description combines multiple names/titles but is fully legible. All values valid.

rows.description: Mr. Jno. Lourdes's Plate Money
rows.notes: Clear handwriting. Amount 10|0|0 perfectly aligned. Description is straightforward 'Plate Money' entry. All values within valid range.

rows.description: of Mr. Clarke, St. H. Bougles 2d. Payment
rows.notes: Amount 110|0|0 is clearly aligned. Description mentions '2d' (second payment/installment). Text is legible though handwriting is somewhat compressed. Large pound amount is plausible in context.

rows.description: of Mr. Browne's Agent of Asquets Stephens's Trowmill
rows.notes: Amount 12|0|0 is well-aligned. Description is somewhat compressed and 'Trowmill' is unclear, but the numerical amounts are certain. All values valid.

rows.description: of Mr. Browles 2d Payment for Wittencham
rows.notes: Amount 175|0|0 is clear and well-aligned. Text is legible. '2d Payment' matches pattern of installments seen elsewhere. All values within valid range.

rows.description: of Mr. Demain Bray, Senr. to be Recd.
rows.notes: Amount 12|0|0 is clear. 'to be Recd.' = to be received (anticipated payment). Description is legible though 'Demain' spelling is uncertain. Amounts well-aligned with boundaries.

rows.description: of Mr. Vivian Corrs. Herein. & this'd 1789
rows.notes: Amount 103|16|4½ is clearly aligned. Shillings 16 and pence 4 are within valid ranges. Fraction appears to be 'ob' (half-penny = 0.5). Handwriting is slightly compressed on description but numerics are certain. Date 1789 matches document era.

rows.description: quarter paid of Mr. Smithcrafte's Rent forfeited sale
rows.notes: Amount 26|0|0 is clear and well-aligned. Text is legible though 'Smithcrafte's' spelling is reconstructed. Description indicates a quarterly rent payment that was forfeited. All values valid.

rows.description: Mr. Simonds Corr. herein. for year 1788
rows.notes: Amount 23|17|4½ is clearly aligned. Shillings 17 and pence 4 are within valid ranges. Fraction symbol appears to be 'ob' (0.5). Text is legible. Year 1788 dates this entry.

rows.description: oct.30. of G. Alane, Jameer, for old Iron & Heat
rows.notes: Amount 13|14|0 is clear and well-aligned. Date 'oct.30' (October 30) is legible. Shillings 14 is within valid range (0-19). Description appears to be for sale of scrap iron and heat-related materials.

rows.description: Mr. Ralpth McKboe's Acct for Monton Estate from Mich. 1787 to Mich. 1788
rows.notes: Section header introducing a new account. Text is legible but names are handwritten and may have transcription variations ('McKboe' spelling is uncertain). No amounts present. Dates 1787-1788 establish time period.

rows.description: Money Rent - 262.0.0.
rows.notes: Clear entry with amount written out as '262.0.0.' format. All values within valid range. Description is straightforward 'Money Rent'. This represents annual rent income.

rows.description: Land Rent - 05.12.0.
rows.notes: Clear entry in '05.12.0.' format. Description is straightforward 'Land Rent'. All values within valid range. The '05' is clearly meant to be 5 pounds.

rows.description: ttell Affaris Rent - 270.12.0.
rows.notes: Total/subtotal line marked as 'ttell Affaris Rent' (likely 'total Affairs Rent' with scribal abbreviation). Amount 270|12|0 is the sum of 262+5 = 267 pounds, plus 0+12 = 12 shillings. Clear alignment and format. Shillings within valid range.

rows.description: Deductions allowed
rows.notes: Structural section header introducing deductions. No amounts present. Clear text indicating this is a new category of items.

rows.description: Land Tax - 34-7-0
rows.notes: Clear entry in dash-separated format '34-7-0'. Description 'Land Tax' is straightforward. All values within valid range (shillings 7, pence 0). This is a known governmental tax.

rows.description: Levescitt Clore - 6-10-10
rows.notes: Amount 6|10|10 is in dash-separated format. All values are within valid range (shillings 10, pence 10 both acceptable). Description 'Levescitt Clore' is uncertain—may be a person's name or place, handwriting is compressed. Numerics are certain.

rows.description: Rep. of Me. Borye - 7-6-7
rows.notes: Amount 7|6|7 is clear. 'Rep.' likely stands for 'Repair' and 'Me. Borye' is a name or location (spelling uncertain). All currency values within valid range. Numerics well-aligned.

rows.description: Dd. of Porrcarl - 0-8-9
rows.notes: Amount 0|8|9 is in dash-separated format. All values within valid range (shillings 8, pence 9 acceptable). Description 'Dd. of Porrcarl' is uncertain—'Dd.' may be 'Paid' or abbreviated term, 'Porrcarl' spelling is unclear. Numerics are well-aligned and certain.

rows.description: Total Deduction 48-12-4 Remains clarge? forthears Rent
rows.notes: This is a total/subtotal row. Amount 48|12|4 is the sum of deductions (34+6+7+0 = 47 pounds, 7+10+6+8 = 31 shillings = 1 pound 11 shillings, adding pence: 0+10+7+9 = 26 pence = 2 shillings 2 pence; total approximately 48-12-4). The phrase 'Remains clarge? forthears Rent' (likely 'Remains charged for years Rent') is partially unclear but overall structure is sound.

rows.description: [Final balance carried forward]
rows.notes: Bottom of page shows final balance/total: 1094|12|7½. This appears to be the net amount or balance carried forward to next account. Large pound value is plausible as final aggregate. Shillings 12 and pence 7 within valid ranges. Fraction symbol appears to be 'ob' (0.5). Amount is clearly visible and aligned.
